name: skills
description: Karan Pinto's curated skill marketplace for Utopia Capital teams and fellows

plugins.name: utopia-dd-pack
plugins.description: Technical due diligence and investment evaluation — assess whether a startup's tech works, scales, and is secure

plugins.name: utopia-design-pack
plugins.description: Full UI/UX design toolkit — 32 skills spanning planning, building, critiquing, and polishing frontend interfaces

plugins.name: utopia-deploy-pack
plugins.description: Ship to production — Railway, Vercel, CI/CD, monitoring, and deployment readiness

plugins.name: utopia-ml-pack
plugins.description: Machine learning and AI workflows — HuggingFace training, evals, datasets, and Transformers.js

plugins.name: utopia-content-pack
plugins.description: Knowledge management and research — Obsidian vaults, markdown, canvases, and web extraction for fellows

plugins.name: utopia-finance-pack
plugins.description: Financial modeling and IB toolkit for DD, valuations, and pitch work — DCF, LBO, comps, earnings analysis, tear sheets, deck work. Skills from Anthropic's financial-services-plugins.

plugins.name: utopia-markets-pack
plugins.description: Capital markets and trading skills — bonds, FX, options, swaps, macro rates, equity research. For public-markets fellows and sell-side work.

plugins.name: utopia-discovery-pack
plugins.description: Venture Engine — Value & IP Creation. Discovery interviews, problem framing, jobs-to-be-done, opportunity solution trees, PRDs, and first-iteration canvases for founders testing problem-market fit.

plugins.name: utopia-narrative-pack
plugins.description: Venture Engine — Go To Market & Narrative. Positioning, hook, copywriting, content strategy, brand narrative, and GTM planning for founders building their market story.

plugins.name: utopia-distribution-pack
plugins.description: Venture Engine — Partners & Trust. BD, sales prospecting, cold outreach, pipeline management, deal desk, and CRM optimization for portfolio companies building their early sales stack.

plugins.name: utopia-retention-pack
plugins.description: Venture Engine — Retention & Value Scaling. Unit economics (CAC, LTV, cohorts), North Star metrics, growth loops, onboarding CRO, churn prevention, and customer ops for founders scaling retained revenue.

plugins.name: utopia-ops-pack
plugins.description: Venture Engine — Core Operations. Legal docs (NDA, privacy policy), hiring, pricing, strategic roadmap, capital structure, and valuation for founders building the business foundation.
